text.title: Spring Boot JUnit Testing Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the layered Spring Boot JUnit methodology end-to-end.

step.name: assign-layer-slice
step.action: Decide the layer per SUT: controller â†’ `@WebMvcTest`, service â†’ plain Mockito, repository â†’ `@DataJpaTest`, cross-layer â†’ one `@SpringBootTest` per module.
step.decision-gate: If a controller test reaches for `@SpringBootTest`, fail per `layer-slice-assignment` rule.

step.name: author-controller-tests
step.action: Add `@WebMvcTest(Controller.class)`; inject `MockMvc`; mock the service via `@MockBean`. Assert HTTP status, content type, and `jsonPath("$.field")` per response shape.

step.name: author-service-tests
step.action: `@ExtendWith(MockitoExtension.class)`; `@Mock` collaborators; `@InjectMocks` SUT. For each branch add a test named `methodUnderTest_state_expectedBehaviour`. Use AssertJ for collections.
step.decision-gate: If `Thread.sleep` is used for async waiting, fail per `awaitility-not-thread-sleep` rule.

step.name: author-repository-tests
step.action: `@DataJpaTest`; `@AutoConfigureTestDatabase(replace = NONE)`; `@Container static PostgreSQLContainer` shared per class. Disable OSIV via `application-test.yml`.
step.decision-gate: If H2 / HSQLDB is used, fail per `testcontainers-not-h2` rule.

step.name: wire-jacoco-gate
step.action: Add Jacoco plugin with `check` goal enforcing thresholds. Add Pitest module for payment/auth/billing critical paths run quarterly. Fail the build when thresholds drop.
step.output: Jacoco + Pitest gates active in CI
step.decision-gate: If thresholds lowered as a "quick fix", BLOCK per `jacoco-gate-in-ci` rule.
